title: 6m tall Eva 01 replica coming to highway rest stop
display_title: 6m tall Eva 01 replica coming to highway rest stop
summary:
[]: 6m tall Eva-01 replica coming to highway rest stop             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Jun 26, 2015 9:34 pm Still working up towards that life size Eva-01. Japanese highway rest stop to get world’s largest Evangelion Unit-01 replica Official site: http://sapa.c-nexco.co.jp/special/eva_ashigara/index Who needs a reason for a photo op with "scantily clad booth babe-type ladies"?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 26, 2015 10:25 pm Whoa, sounds pretty crazy. Hope to see that Eva-01 IRL someday! (Just tweeted about it on the EGF twitter, thanks for the news!)

[]:             Quote Post by holomuran » Sun Jul 12, 2015 5:21 pm Looks sweet, even though I can't read kanji to save my life! That wireframe rendition is badass too. Something to visit when I next visit Japan ;)

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Jul 12, 2015 8:50 pm You've got until December 23 of this year, so start planning!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Thu Jul 23, 2015 9:43 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Evafan full reports: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3899.html

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Jul 23, 2015 11:00 am Now that's pretty freaking cool. I'd love to visit one of these places! Edit: Has NTE Unit 01 always had that red umbilical port on the back? I can't recall seeing that.
